org: J.P. Morgan Chase · Corporate & Investment Bank
paperDesc: Athena Developer for Currencies Emerging Markets (FX Cash & Options) in JPMC's Corporate & Investment Bank. I worked on migrating workloads to AWS, built a monitoring and visualisation tool used globally across various lines of business (e.g. commodities, rates), and served as SME for cloud migration workload and data visualisation.
financeDesc: Athena Developer for Currencies Emerging Markets (FX Cash & Options) in JPMC's Corporate & Investment Bank. I worked on migrating workloads to AWS, built a monitoring and visualisation tool used globally across various lines of business (e.g. commodities, rates), and served as SME for cloud migration workload and data visualisation.

detail.body: From April 2024 to March 2025, I worked at J.P. Morgan Chase as an Athena Developer for Currencies Emerging Markets (FX Cash & Options) in the Corporate & Investment Bank. During this time, I focused on extracting, optimising, & migrating trader reports and server worwadkloads from legacy systems to Amazon Web Services. I built a workload monitoring and visualisation tool used globally across various lines of business (e.g. commodities, rates), and served as subject-matter expert for the cloud migration workload and data visualisation.
detail.private: Specific internals are JPMC-internal, but I'm more than happy to go deeper in an interview.

tech.title: J.P. Morgan Chase · CIB
tech.bodyHtml: Specialised in workload migration, data analytics, and tool development on the Athena platform. Created a tool used globally by various lines of business to monitor workloads and visualise areas for optimisation. SME for cloud migration workload and data visualisation.
highlights: Monitoring & visualisation tool adopted across LOBs worldwide
Python at scale: Athena, parallel computing, in-memory databases
Largely classified; happy to go deeper in an interview
